positive: A minimalist and highly stylized illustration of a mountain range at sunset, featuring sharply defined peaks and deep, contrasting silhouettes. The style is modern graphic vector art with thick linework and flat color washes, emphasizing negative space. The foreground includes stylized geometric flora and winding paths. The color palette should utilize deep indigo, fiery orange, muted gold, and clean slate blue, creating a high-contrast, breathable gradient. Central composition with strong verticality, perfect for apparel printing. Inspired by mid-century modern design and Japanese Sumi-e ink washes. Clean edges and perfect symmetry.
